initial_description:
in my Gmail account i receive mails from ceo@acmecorp.com. Every mail from this sender should be filed as follows:
1. save this mail to my Notion database under Email Tracker. Store the sender's email address and the email body. Mail this under MAIL
2 send an email to erik@fiber.nl. Subject: Please respond to customer. With message: The CEO of Acme Corp has reached out from their email address. I would like you to respond to them. (Include sender's email address)

interactions.question: In your Notion database Email Tracker, should the email be saved as a new item with the sender’s email address and full email body in separate fields, or do you want a different field layout?
interactions.answer: sender's email address and full email body
interactions.updated_description: In my Gmail account, I receive mails from ceo@acmecorp.com. Every mail from this sender should be filed as follows: 1. Save this mail to my Notion database under Email Tracker as a new item, with the sender’s email address and the full email body in separate fields. File this under MAIL. 2. Send an email to erik@fiber.nl with the subject: Please respond to customer. In the message, say: The CEO of Acme Corp has reached out from their email address. I would like you to respond to them. Include the sender’s email address.

interactions.question: Should the email sent to erik@fiber.nl include the full email body, or only the sender’s email address and the message you wrote?
interactions.answer: to erik only the sender's email address and my message

interactions.question: What details should be saved in your Notion item, and what should each field contain?
interactions.updated_description: In my Gmail account, I receive mails from ceo@acmecorp.com in the Inbox. Every mail from this sender should be filed as follows: 1. Save this mail to my Notion database under Email Tracker as a new item, using the email subject line as the title, with the fields Sender and Email Body. The Sender field should contain the sender’s email address, and the Email Body field should contain the full email body. File this under MAIL. 2. Send an email from Gmail to erik@fiber.nl with the subject: please respond to customer. In the message, say: The CEO of Acme Corp has reached out from their email address. I would like you to respond to them. Include only the sender’s email address and my message. Gmail should check the Inbox for new messages every hour.
